# Scribble PartyAlternatives

Exploring alternatives to Scribble Party’s local‑first whiteboard? Try Excalidraw for hand‑drawn diagrams, Loom for quick async walkthroughs, and Tella for polished screen demos. Team-first options like Bubbles and Floik help turn ideas into interactive guides.

Scribble Party

## Scribble Party

Launching today

## A local-first whiteboard studio for teachers and creators

163 followers

## A local-first whiteboard studio for teachers and creators

163 followers

Visit website

Digital whiteboards

Most lesson recorders send your video to someone's cloud and want an account first. Scribble Party runs entirely in your browser. Draw on an infinite canvas, drop a live camera bubble of yourself on the board (it cuts out your background), and record the whole thing with your voice. Recordings save to your device as you go, so a crashed tab doesn't lose a take. Works offline as an installed app. No signup, no install, nothing ever uploaded!

results.title: Sensory play at-home parties for toddlers in NYC or Westchester | Scribble Art Workshop
results.content:
Scribble Art Workshop
Scribble Art Workshop

PARTIES | YOUR PLACE | SENSORY PLAY PARTIES

# Sensory Play Parties at Your Place

Planning a party at your place? We’ll send an expert Scribble teacher and some amazing sensory materials right to your door. Our 60-minute activities are perfect for kids 18 months - 4 years.

## LOCATION

Your place (or another venue) in Westchester, NYC, or Boulder

## COST

$300 for 60 minutes of party time for up to 10 kids\ (90 minutes total, including set up and pack up)

\For 11+ kids, an additional $6 per child

## SCHEDULE

15 minutes: Teacher arrives to set up

15 minutes: Open-ended art activity with themed materials

45 minutes: Sensory play with themed materials

15 minutes: Teacher packs up

## THE SET UP [...] 15 minutes: Teacher packs up

## THE SET UP

Birthday cards for guests to decorate with themed art materials

3+\ bins containing rice, kinetic sand, and/or water, along with various materials that match your chosen theme

\More bins included based on number of guests

## OPTIONAL ADD-ONS

$6.50 per goody bag (contents match your chosen theme!)

$100 for extra 1/2 hr of sensory play

## HEADCOUNT

We'll need a final headcount 2 weeks in advance in order to make sure we have enough staff and materials prepared.

Please note that booking must be done a minimum of 4 weeks in advance.

## THEME OPTIONS

### 🚗 Transportation City

### 🧜‍♀️ Sea Creatures & Mermaids

### 🐮 Fantastical Farmyard

### 🦖 Jurassic Play

### Don’t let the kids have all the fun!

#### FOR PARENTS [...] ### Don’t let the kids have all the fun!

#### FOR PARENTS

results.title: Scribble Dabble Studio | Making Space for Creativity in CT
results.content:
### classes### parties### private pods

### upcoming events### private parties### socials

# Where creatives come to play

## Scribble Dabble is all about making space for creativity,

### wherever you are...

## We pop-up with fun, hands-on experiences for kids AND adults –

bringing art, play and connection to homes, community spaces and local businesses around Fairfield County, CT. Whether you’re looking to create with your kiddo or try something new just for you, you’ll find inspiration (and your people) here.

book a party

UPCOMING CLASSES

### Let's create, together

### classes [...] UPCOMING CLASSES

### Let's create, together

### classes

Join a weekly class designed for little ones (ages 1–4) and their grown-ups to create and connect with other local families. Want something more personal? Host a private playdate with friends—same hands-on fun, just your crew (we come to you).

LEARN MORE

### parties

From birthdays to holiday parties—we bring the fun to you. Our creative crew pops up at your home or venue with hands-on art + play experiences that keep kids engaged and make celebrating easy (and way more fun).

LEARN MORE

### socials

Whether it’s a cozy weekend workshop or a laid-back night out, Creative Socials is our answer to creative play just for grown ups. We pop up at local spots around Fairfield County, CT to help you unwind, get creative, and connect. [...] LEARN MORE

### Fun, engaging art experiences for creatives of all ages and experience levels – never dull, never frustrating – enjoy the process and love what you make.

UPCOMING CLASSES
book a party

Don't just take our word for it...

Such a fun class! Both of my boys have loved it. Allie and Mila set up amazing and enriching activities for the kids each week. There are always tons of smiling faces in the classroom. Highly recommend!

We hired Scribble Dabble for our daughter’s 3rd birthday after attending a friend’s party they put on. Allie was a pleasure to work with. She was organized, punctual and so creative! All our guests went home with themed art, and everyone was raving about all the activities her team put on. We will absolutely hire Scribble Dabble again!
